name: Timothy Teter
background: Timothy S. Teter joined NVIDIA in 2017 as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary. Prior to NVIDIA, Mr. Teter was a partner at the law firm of Cooley LLP, where he practiced for two decades and served as outside counsel to NVIDIA. Mr. Teter holds a B.S. degree in Mechanical Engineering from the University of California, Davis and a J.D. degree from Stanford Law School.

companies.name: NVIDIA Corporation
companies.title_or_role: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary
